**Goal:**
Stabilize and modernize the current Explorer.

**Requirements:**
Use the [RFP process](https://forum.livepeer.org/t/pre-proposal-transformation-spe-ii/3062#p-7111-what-is-the-transformation-spe-3) to fund a small backend team to fix bugs, improve performance and security, add baseline tests, and update the codebase. Address priority issues and clear the existing feature backlog. Establish a workflow for incorporating community feedback and shaping the roadmap.

**Tracked By:**
https://github.com/orgs/livepeer/projects/6/views/1
